name: NADage NR frailty trial is recruiting without posted results
summary: Recruiting phase 2 registry testing nicotinamide riboside replenishment therapy against functional decline in aging and frailty, with no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06208527 as recruiting with 100 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Older adults with aging or frailty-related functional decline
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 100; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
